name: vst-gen
description: Generate VST3/AU/Standalone MIDI controller plugins from hardware synth front panels. @vst-gen chat participant for NRPN capture, panel analysis, and JUCE 8 scaffolding.

chatParticipants.name: vst-gen
chatParticipants.description: Generate VST3/AU/Standalone MIDI controller plugins from hardware synth front panels.

commands.name: new-device
commands.description: Start the guided workflow: registry check → manual extract → MIDI capture → knob coords → JUCE scaffold

commands.name: login
commands.description: Register your GitHub account with the community device registry (device flow)

vstGen.registryUrl.description: Community registry base URL. Leave blank to use the default HappyPathway registry.

vstGen.toolsPath.description: Path to a local vst-gen-agent clone containing tools/. Leave blank to use the bundled copies.

vstGen.outputFolder.description: Subfolder inside the workspace where generated device projects are placed.

vstGen.githubClientId.description: GitHub OAuth App client ID for the device flow login. Obtain from the registry operator.
